source._note: Real Aspen Motorsports Park (550 Raceway Rd, Woody Creek, CO). From OSM highway=raceway way 192313782 (1-mile road course), native CCW winding reversed to CW, resampled to 3 m via scripts.gps.from_track. Elevation from USGS 3DEP bare-earth (mountain site, do NOT flatten); NO banking (road course).

road_profile._doc: Flat road course — no banking. dips/cambers intentionally empty; deck follows bare-earth 3DEP.

route._orientation_doc: Research 2026-07-20: Aspen Motorsports Park runs CLOCKWISE (official map corners 1-7 CW; crash-report geometry corroborates). Our ring is already CW. S/F on the short N-S chute south of the final hairpin (~39.2669,-106.8800), cars heading SSW; checkered timing stand beside it. Pit lane: east side of the S/F chute (driver's left), ~100-150 m, splits at hairpin exit, rejoins after S/F.
